subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-20 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Dr. Ardasheer has learned osteopathy very well. He desires to give you a massage.... They investigate every question.... They go to self-interested strangers
subcodes.subjects: @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause, @praise of Western values; culture, @unity; oneness of humanity
